name: The Shipman Files: A Very British Crime Story
original_name: The Shipman Files: A Very British Crime Story
overview: The story of how the crimes of ‘respected’ GP Harold Shipman were first discovered and how he was eventually apprehended and charged with the murder of 15 of his own patients.
